name: Google Forms
shortDescription: Complete Google Forms management for creating, updating, and processing form responses. Build dynamic survey workflows, manage form structures, and extract valuable data from submissions.

actions.name: Get Forms List
actions.description: Retrieves a list of Google Forms available in Google Drive.

actions.name: Delete Form
actions.description: Deletes a Google Form by its ID.

actions.name: Update Form Advanced
actions.description: Updates a Google Form using the batchUpdate request. This method allows for multiple item modifications within a single request, including adding, updating, or removing form items. Refer to the official Google Forms API documentation for more details on the structure and supported operations https://developers.google.com/forms/api/reference/rest/v1/forms/batchUpdate .

actions.name: Get Form Details
actions.description: Retrieves details of a specified Google Form by its ID.

actions.name: Get Form Responses List
actions.description: Lists all responses for a specified Google Form.

actions.name: Get Form Response by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a specific response for a Google Form by its response ID.

idealUseCases: Creating dynamic surveys and forms for customer feedback collection
Managing form structures with automated field updates and modifications
Processing form responses for lead generation and customer insights
Building automated survey workflows with conditional logic and branching
Integrating form data with CRM systems and marketing automation
Creating feedback collection systems for product and service improvement
Managing large-scale data collection campaigns with form validation
Automating form response analysis and reporting workflows
